author: flyingnobita
description: Displays the number of stars for GitHub repositories mentioned in notes.

manifest.author: Flying Nobita
manifest.description: Displays the number of stars for GitHub repositories mentioned in notes.
manifest.name: GitHub Stars

name: GitHub Stars

releases.author: flyingnobita
releases.description:
Release 1.5.1 updates the repository tooling and package management setup without changing plugin behavior.

Major changes:
- align package tooling with the current official Obsidian sample plugin
- standardize the repository on pnpm and remove package-lock.json
- add flat ESLint configuration and repo-local pnpm build approval
- pin CodeMirror packages to Obsidian peer versions for cleaner installs

releases.author: flyingnobita
releases.description:
GitHub Stars 1.5.0 adds vault-wide maintenance commands and hardens the release pipeline.

Major changes:
- Added commands to refresh, embed, and remove GitHub star counts across all markdown notes in the vault.
- Deduplicated repository refreshes across the vault to avoid redundant GitHub requests during bulk refresh.
- Added CI validation for `pnpm test` and `pnpm build`, plus required status checks on `main`.
- Added unit test coverage for vault-wide helper behavior and declared missing CodeMirror dependencies for reproducible installs.

releases.author: flyingnobita
releases.description:
Refine refresh behavior, add regression tests, and update project docs.

Major changes:
- refresh the current note from GitHub even when cache entries are still valid
- update embedded star text without embedding plain links
- update existing embedded stars on Reading View and Live Preview refresh paths when the setting is enabled
- add refresh token warning controls and safer fallback behavior for failed refreshes
- add unit tests covering cache bypass and embedded-star refresh regressions

releases.author: flyingnobita
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Removed
- Display Format setting — star counts are now always shown as `⭐ {stars}` (e.g. `⭐ 1.2k`)

### Changed
- Updated README with improved structure, badges, and documentation

### Fixed
- Corrected author name in `package.json`

releases.author: flyingnobita
releases.description:
### Bug Fixes
- Fix duplicate star decorations in Live Preview when star counts are already embedded in markdown

### Changes
- Change default cache expiry from 60 minutes to 1 day (1440 minutes)
- Update README documentation

releases.author: flyingnobita
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Embed star counts into markdown**: New command *"Embed star counts in current note"* writes star counts (e.g. `⭐ 1.2k`) directly into your markdown file after each GitHub link. Anyone reading the raw `.md` file outside Obsidian can see the counts.
- **Remove embedded star counts**: New command *"Remove embedded star counts from current note"* strips all embedded counts from the file.
- Re-running the embed command updates existing counts to their latest values.

releases.author: flyingnobita
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Live Preview support**: GitHub star counts now display inline in Obsidian's Live Preview (Editing View) mode, powered by a CodeMirror 6 ViewPlugin with widget decorations.
- Star counts use the existing cache for instant rendering when available, with async fetching and a loading indicator for uncached repos.
- Reading View support remains unchanged.
